source.body_text_sample:
HOME
 
ABOUT US
 
OUR QUALITY
 
PRODUCTS
 
COMPANY NEWS
 
CONTACT US
CAREER OPPORTUNITIES

Are you looking for a career opportunity with an industry leader?

We are a global company looking for individuals who are committed to providing innovative solutions, product excellence and exceptional customer service to a wide range of customers in a global marketplace.

We offer a dynamic work environment within a progressive company, who takes pride in our team oriented success as well as providing a competitive salary and exceptional benefits package.


What you can expect as a Fabris Inc. Team Member:

• Competitive wages
• 100% funded benefit program, including Life, Health, Dental and Vision
• 100% company matched Pension Plan
• Profit Sharing
• A work environment that promotes team work and synergy
• A supportive and engaged Management team


If you are ambitious, energetic and can handle multiple projects and deadlines then we invite you to join our team.

Fabris is an equal opportunity employer and would like to thank all applicants for their interest, however, only those who are selected for an interview will be contacted. Please inform us of accommodation requests during interview booking

Interested candidates are invited to email or fax their resume to:
Fabris Inc.
1216 South Service Road
Stoney Creek, Ontario L8E 5C4
Fax: (905) 643-8524
Email: hr@fabris.com


We are currently accepting resumes for:



CNC MACHINIST




The successful candidate will work as part of the M
